feed.title: RemRemRemRe
feed.subtitle: Sharing something useful to the world :)

entry.title: A way to combine multiple unreal projects into one

link.title: A way to combine multiple unreal projects into one

entry.summary:
Original intention
For working and studying purpose, I have multiple Unreal Projects on my computer, and they share the same engine
By default, each project file is a stand-alone solution file generated by UBT(Unreal Build Tool)
This brings me some problems: - Due to the high cost of opening a solution, the waiting time and memory footprint may get multiplied when opening multiple solut...
